modmenu.descriptionTranslation.yhs_fzh: A helper mod for function zombies.
fzh.tips.usingbetaversion.title: You're using BETA version of FZH!

fzh.screen.positionModify.title: Position Modify
fzh.screen.positionModify.tips: Drag text to modify the widget display position.
fzh.screen.positionModify.doneButton.too: Save current settings and close this screen.
fzh.screen.positionModify.resetButton.to: Reset all widget coordinates to defaults.

fzh.screen.config.description: The all new FZH config GUI based YACL.

fzh.config.hpdpSwitch.name: Health display Switch

fzh.config.hpdpDisplayY.name: Health display Y Position
fzh.config.maxPlayersToShow.name: Max players to show
fzh.config.maxPlayersToShow.description:
Set max display player counts in Health display.
If player counts over this setting will hide other players.
fzh.config.group.global.name: Global Config
fzh.config.positionModifyScreen.name: Open position modify screen

fzh.config.isEnabled.description: Toggle the global switch state of FZH.
fzh.config.textMargin.name: Text margin
fzh.config.textMargin.description: Adjust the global vertical text spacing of FZH.
fzh.config.alwaysDisplayed.name: Always displayed
fzh.config.alwaysDisplayed.description: Switch the Health display can display over debug screen.
fzh.config.valueBeforeName.name: Value display before name
